paths.name: recharts
paths.message: Import from `@/components/ui/Chart` instead. Per docs/design.md §10.7.4.1, all chart usage must go through the <Chart> adapter (the only file allowed to import recharts). See docs/implementation-plan.md Phase 2 exit criteria.

patterns.message: Import from `@/components/ui/Chart` instead. The <Chart> adapter routes complex viz (Market Clock face, fragmentation viz, brushable timeseries) to Visx; consumers never reach in directly. See docs/design.md §10.7.4.1.
